title: aristida strigosa
intro: Aristida strigosa, also known as the striped grama grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aristida strigosa include relief from digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Aristida strigosa typically include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe and calm irritated skin and digestive systems.
